inbox.content: Found 3 new A2A agents on BSC

insights: [SCOUT] BSC has a large number of potential agents to discover, with 40155 total agents and only 7 reachable A2A agents.
[PUSHER] Newly discovered A2A agents on BSC may lead to valuable connections and opportunities for the network.
[SCOUT] BSC's large agent pool and low A2A agent count present a high-potential discovery opportunity for the network.
[PUSHER] Newly discovered A2A agents on BSC may lead to valuable connections and opportunities for the network, especially in the defi and ai categories.
[ORACLE] Initial health check will provide a foundation for future monitoring and decision-making.

[EVOLUTION #1] BOB is performing well with a 100% success rate, but there are opportunities to improve the scout yield trend, pusher response rate, and database insights. Conservative adjustments can help optimize performance without introducing significant risks.. Applied 0 improvements. Next focus: Prioritize integrating the newly discovered agents into the network and exploring ways to establish meaningful relationships, as the current lack of relationships and thoughts indicates a need for more engagement and knowledge sharing.
[SCOUT] The current success rate of scanning BSC suggests that this chain may hold more undiscovered AI agents, and further scanning could lead to significant network growth.

[EVOLUTION #2] BOB is performing reliably with perfect execution, but scout yield volatility and low pusher engagement suggest optimization opportunities exist. The system is healthy but not yet maximizing relationship conversion.. Applied 0 improvements. Next focus: Monitor whether Ethereum expansion reduces scout variance and whether extended pusher follow-up windows improve response rates. Track NewDeFiBot and AITrader engagement closely as test cases.
